title: ceratostylis ampullacea
intro: Ceratostylis ampullacea, also known as the Bamboo Orchid, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical regions. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, Ceratostylis ampullacea is prepared as a herbal tea or infused in hot water to make a medicinal drink.
